title: Create: Integrated Farming
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LJNQth9FJsw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Welcome to **Create: Integrated Farming**, a mod adding more farming appliance and compat for Create.

### We currently offer:
* **Fishing Net**: Contraption conponent for catching of small aquatic animal and fishing at the same time
* **Roost**: Fast-track poultry product output. Support chicken, duck & goose from **Untitled Duck**
* **Mechanical Arm Harvest**: Mechanical Arm can properly harvest Bullet Pepper from **My Nether's Delight**, Huge Lily & Huge Lily Pad from **Twilight's Flavor and Delight**.
* **Harvester Compat**: Harvester is compatibile with plants and crops of multiple mods
* **Mechanical Arm Compat**: Mechanical Arm supports Basket from **Farmer's Delight**, Crab Trap from **Crabber's Delight**
* **Spout with Compost**: Spout catalyzes transformation of Organic Compost from **Farmer's Delight** and Leteos Compost from **My Nether's Delight**
* Harvester's behavior fully supports enchantment from **Create Enchantable Machinery**
* **Lava Fishing Net**: Lava fishing experience, with **Nether Depths Upgrade**
* **Lightning Rod Charging Soil**: Support Weather Soil from **Delight o' Flight**

If you'd like to add more things, please suggest them to us [here](https://github.com/DragonsPlusMinecraft/CreateIntegratedFarming/issues)!

### Installation Requirements
**Create** & [Create: Dragons Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dragons-plus)

**Farmer's Delight** is highly recommended.

If you are a modpack author and need more customization information, please check [this](https://github.com/DragonsPlusMinecraft/CreateIntegratedFarming/blob/1.21.1/6.0.0-dev/MODPACK_README.md).
